programme.title: E155
programme.desc: A man accused of indecency with a child's doll faces his accuser in court; an arsonist who killed nine people hears it from the judge; a multi-murder suspect misbehaves in the courtroom; and more.

programme.title: E108 - Friends And Enemies
programme.desc: When three people are gunned down in a Tulsa home, detectives face two suspects, and a web of lies. Prosecutors are left with circumstantial evidence to clinch the case against a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: E11 - Murder Mastermind Or Innocent Witness?
programme.desc: Police reopen the cold case murder of a young Marine who was killed in a hotel room and charge the woman who was with him at the time. Is she the mastermind behind his death or an innocent victim?

programme.title: E117 - A Killer Fight
programme.desc: After a beloved Mobile man is gunned down in his front yard, conflicting eyewitness accounts leave detectives wondering if the suspect might have acted in self-defence.

programme.title: E5 - Fighting For The Kids
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them. Stories of children who experienced the unthinkable: six girls hunted and murdered in their neighbourhoods; and more.

programme.title: Born To Shine
programme.desc: The series revolves around music and chasing dreams.

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Born To Shine
programme.desc: The series revolves around music and chasing dreams.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Fast Talk With Boy Abunda
programme.desc: The latest multi-platform showbiz news and talk show on Kapuso network.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Let's Talk About Cancer
programme.desc: The doctors talk about cancer, explaining what it is, why people get it, how it can be treated, and how to help someone going through it.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Mannequin
programme.desc: Henry meets a mannequin in a shop window. Mannequin loves living in the shop window but he has always dreamed of becoming a super model.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Chukwuebuka and Chinonso (Kid Eche): Renowned Freestyle Footballer
programme.desc: Chinonso Eche and his coach, Chukwuebuka Ezugha, are both football freestylers who hold many GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS titles. They meet Alan Pixsley and teach him the basics of football freestyle.

programme.title: Let's Talk About Cancer
programme.desc: The doctors talk about cancer, explaining what it is, why people get it, how it can be treated, and how to help someone going through it.

programme.title: Leaving Your Comfort Zone
programme.desc: The artistic seniors are back from the World Championships and have qualified for the next Olympic Games, so it's time for the coaches to start thinking about who will make up the Olympic team. Amelie and Phoebe have been invited to an elite training camp in Liverpool.

programme.title: Life-saving Blood Donations
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand do an experiment to show how eating different types of food affected their poo. Dr. Xand donates blood and finds out how it is processed. There are patients with a cut hand and a cut eyebrow in the emergency room.

programme.title: Overcoming Fears
programme.desc: Sam and Morgan operate on Gandalf the falcon's lumpy foot. And the Junior Vets are about to find out what real vet work is all about. But will Saira overcome her fear of big dogs to help stray hound Jessie, who needs life-changing surgery?

programme.title: Inside the Earth
programme.desc: Inspired by digging at the beach, Darwin and Newts hop on board a drilling vehicle to explore the layers of the Earth beneath their feet.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: Trials and Tribulations
programme.desc: Coach Esther brings in a star choreographer to try and get the Icicles in shape. Meanwhile, ice hockey-mad Charlie is joined by his best friend as they compete in a late-night trial.

programme.title: On the Spoor of the Big Snake - Part 3: Making Deep Tracks
programme.desc: Five young explorers visit the biggest canyon in Africa on their search for the legendary Big Snake in [Ai] Ais/Richtersveld Transfrontier Park. They learn about geology and how the canyon was shaped and listen to campfire stories about the Big Snake.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Trip to Australia
programme.desc: Zoe bumps her head on a metal light fitting and is looking for medicine to relieve the pain of the headache. In Australia, some people treat headaches with plants. Our heroes will have to meet William and Japaljarri, and they will be surprised!

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Cathedrals
programme.desc: If you want a cathedral, you'd better not be in a hurry! The construction site is a village in its own right, and lasts for several generations! Foreman Howler shows us round a medieval construction site, providing us with a 101 on cathedral-building techniques.

programme.title: Mystery of the Headless Haunter
programme.desc: Addison has to solve the mystery of what's making scary sounds after Donnie convinces the other kids on an Ayrton Rangers camping trip that a mythical spook called the Headless Haunter is wandering through the park.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Maleficent Mosquitoes
programme.desc: When swarms of mosquitoes mysteriously descend on the park, the kids' summer movie night is in danger of being cancelled unless Addison and her friends can figure out a way to stop them.

programme.title: Tablecloth
programme.desc: Let's turn the tablecloth into something festive!

programme.title: Trip to Korea
programme.desc: Zoe and Alim are surprised to see Milo holding his breath. Did he eat something spicy? No, he's just trying to beat his apnea record. When Zoe wants to try, Milo claims boys are better. Alim takes them to South Korea, where women dive for pearls, and men stay home!

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: Fire Team Doki
programme.desc: After a false fire alarm at the clubhouse, the team is very impressed with the firefighters who answer the call. What does it take to be a firefighter? Firefighter Domenic offers to train the team at the fire hall, so they can see for themselves!

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Ebb the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Flo plans a Circus Show for Granny's birthday with Ebb and Bird. Ebb doesn't want to learn new tricks but Bird does. A nosey gull makes Ebb bark twice and it seems Ebb can count to 2! Flo's show is a great success. Things couldn't be better.

programme.title: Fire Team Doki
programme.desc: After a false fire alarm at the clubhouse, the team is very impressed with the firefighters who answer the call. What does it take to be a firefighter? Firefighter Domenic offers to train the team at the fire hall, so they can see for themselves!

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Digging Deeper
programme.desc: The object that Will and Ant are retrieving from the deepest part of the ocean is not what they expected. They've been tricked.

programme.title: Big in Japan
programme.desc: Flippy and Motor record a video parody of a song from a teen duo, hoping to annoy the singers' fans. But their version accidentally becomes a hit itself, and they find their musical integrity compromised by their sudden popularity.

programme.title: Rip Roaring Roller Coaster
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build their own roller-coaster and learn how trains stay on track and how you can loop the loop.

programme.title: Can I Have Superhero Vision?
programme.desc: X-Rays are a type of electromagnetic radiation. They were discovered in 1895 by Wilhelm Roentgen and helped medicine make a great leap forward. When we look at an X-Ray image we can see shadows of the objects the x-ray passes through, like superheroes.

programme.title: Can I Have Superhero Vision?
programme.desc: X-Rays are a type of electromagnetic radiation. They were discovered in 1895 by Wilhelm Roentgen and helped medicine make a great leap forward. When we look at an X-Ray image we can see shadows of the objects the x-ray passes through, like superheroes.

programme.title: Can Slime Think?
programme.desc: Slime mould are cleverer than they look even though they don't have eyes, a skeleton, a nervous system, or even a brain. They are single-celled organisms. There are more than 900 species of them all over the world.

programme.title: The Friend (Courteney Cox) and the Showman (Channing Tatum)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, award-winning actress and producer Courteney Cox, of Friends, recounts how she became a TV star and Channing Tatum reflects on how he went from a struggling student to a recognized Hollywood actor.

E17
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: E2 - Aicha Bastien N'diaye (Guinea)
programme.desc: Born to a mother from the Wendat Nation and a Guinean father, Aicha was raised in Wendake, Quebec, between African drums and Indigenous dances. A multidisciplinary artist, she defends her roots through her art and actions, and fights for the preservation of ancestral territories.

programme.title: E309 - Bad Luck Bob / The Sandman Cometh
programme.desc: SpongeBob experiences a bad luck streak when his lucky tie clip suddenly goes missing. // When Patrick can't fall asleep, he seeks assistance from the Sandman.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window.

programme.title: E101 - Left in the Dark / Get the Message
programme.desc: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

programme.title: E601 - Present Danger
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed.

programme.title: E315 - Smartificial Intelligence / Firehouse Bob
programme.desc: Perch fights for his job after he's fired and replaced by a robot anchorman. // SpongeBob, Patrick, and Squidward feel the heat when they become volunteer firefighters.

programme.title: E198 - Sharks vs. Pods / CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: 'The Sharks' are the toughest guys in town, but their next confrontation might be too much for SpongeBob to handle. // Plankton clones SpongeBob in an effort to steal Krabs’ secret formula, but original Bob might ruin his plans.

programme.title: E414 - Good Sports
programme.desc: Lynn finds an unexpected TV sports watching buddy in the family's next-door neighbor, Mr. Grouse.

programme.title: E205 - The Other Mutanimals
programme.desc: Desperate to save Wingnut from Tokka, Rahzar, & the Monster Mutanimals, Donnie delves deeper into the lab of a mad scientist. Meanwhile, his brothers follow another Tokka to the Staten Island lab... only for things to take a disastrous turn!

programme.title: E284 - The Flower Plot / SpongeBob on Parade
programme.desc: The Chum Bucket is replaced by a flower shop with a charming new owner. // The Krusty Krab enters a float in the annual Bikini Bottom Parade.

programme.title: E111 - Henry the Man-Beast
programme.desc: Henry’s got a big date, but things don't go quite as planned after he's accidentally exposed to a strange device in the Man Cave.

programme.title: E101 - Left in the Dark / Get the Message
programme.desc: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E403 - Roll Model with the Casagrandes / No Show with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero. // Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favorite telenovela after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: E110 - Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: E622 - Pop Pop the Question / Lynn and Order
programme.desc: When the kids discover Myrtle has a shady past, they try to expose her before Pop Pop proposes. // Lynn and Liam butt heads when they're forced to partner up as the middle school hall monitors.

programme.title: E14 - Spinach
programme.desc: It's the exceptional painter, Spinach, creating Kiwi's portrait, if Kiwi can keep still.

programme.title: E50 - Moustache Mystery
programme.desc: Broccoli is horrified when someone paints moustaches on photographs of her friends!

programme.title: E93 - Cold
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are outside in the cold when they spot the Tiddlytubbies who are warm, inside. The Teletubbies put on hats, gloves and scarves to keep warm.

programme.title: E7 - Sheep
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'sheep' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different sheep - a white sheep, a baa-ing sheep, a leaping sheep and a noodle sheep.

programme.title: E4 - Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E29 - Mud Volcano, Azerbaijan
programme.desc: Glitch's plan to use methane gas from a mud volcano to power Lars's new machine has explosive results! Can the bickering pair stop a huge fire and save the Grimbots?

programme.title: E16 - Phones
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E7 - Andy And The Blue Duck Chicks
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to New Zealand on a baby animal mission to help rescue a family of blue ducks and their chicks from a fast flowing river. Along the way, Andy takes a ride on a pukeko chick and meets a hedgehog.

programme.title: E3 - Gloves
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: E20 - Out Of Site
programme.desc: Brenda learns that it is important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programme.title: E37 - Sleepover
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hettie with a sleepover at the museum for some of the children. They do a treasure hunt and a night-time picnic, but antics ensue when they clean up after themselves.

programme.title: E4 - It's Time For A Spring Clear Out
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are having a spring clear out, but when Gran Gran wants to clear out her old jumper, JoJo is distraught - she loves that snuggly jumper!

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E52 - The Glasses Badge
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true?

programme.title: E51 - The Fashion Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's uniform is a bit old and needs to be updated. Duggee can make his own clothes!

programme.title: E4 - What's Hot?
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.desc: After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in 'Dance Mode' as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E37 - Sleepover
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hettie with a sleepover at the museum for some of the children. They do a treasure hunt and a night-time picnic, but antics ensue when they clean up after themselves.

programme.title: E5 - It's Time To Find A Butterfly
programme.desc: JoJo searches for a butterfly to complete her nature tick-book. She learns that all butterflies start life as furry little caterpillars.

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E52 - The Glasses Badge
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true?

programme.title: E16 - Lychee
programme.desc: Love and peace symbol, Lychee, performs his song - 'All You Need is Lychee!'

programme.title: E52 - Broccoli's Movie Night
programme.desc: Broccoli screens Supertato: The Movie, but Evil Pea has plans to change the story.

programme.title: E8 - Watch The Birdie
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: E5 - Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: E4 - Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E2 - Lake Manyara National Park
programme.desc: In north Tanzania, towering mountains line a dramatic valley. Enriched by ancient volcanoes, its slopes provide a variety of habitats for life to thrive and its great centerpiece holds water through even the driest of times.

programme.title: E4 - Namaqualand: the Desert Bloom
programme.desc: For most of the year it’s a desert, but during early August and September the dusty valleys of Namaqualand transform into a wonderland carpeted with wildflowers. Witness this magnificent transformation from arid desert to beautiful oasis.

programme.title: E1 - Into the Heat
programme.desc: Meet the unlikely collaborators working to ensure mutual survival in the Kalahari Basin. Learn of an elephant clan’s symbiotic link to fruiting anaboom trees, a meerkat’s alliance with a feisty drongo bird, and more flora-and-fauna odd couples.

programme.title: E2 - The Wild West
programme.desc: Trek through the Canadian rainforest, look up at dizzying redwood trees, and explore giant kelp forests with Lizzie as she experiences the wild west coast of North America. Cross paths with wolves and bears while salmon travel upstream to lay eggs.

programme.title: E3 - Crowded Seas
programme.desc: Dip into North America’s southern coastal waters, where opalescent squid mate, sea turtles nest, and mobula rays take flight for the sake of romance. Fly a specialized drone with Lizzie as she swoops in for a breath sample from a blue whale.

programme.title: E2 - Lake Manyara National Park
programme.desc: In north Tanzania, towering mountains line a dramatic valley. Enriched by ancient volcanoes, its slopes provide a variety of habitats for life to thrive and its great centerpiece holds water through even the driest of times.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E10 - Bear Down

programme.desc: In the swamp, the team uncovers a previously unknown structure remarkably resembling a container. And after weeks of chasing the elusive Chappell Vault, the Fellowship hits a void deep in the Money Pit.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: History Detective 'Saigo Takamori'
programme.desc: A historical documentary program starring an actor Sato Jiro as a boss of a history detective agency. Conducting on-site investigations and scientific simulations, Jiro and his detective team dig into and uncover the truth from historic mystery.

programme.title: 1-Minute Anime: Songs For Sdgs
programme.desc: Let's learn about SDGs while singing along! A selected goal out of 17 will be introduced in each one-minute song with animation.

programme.title: Making Waves: Is Tidal Power Financially Viable?
programme.desc: Energy from sea tides is currently expensive. But cutting-edge turbines are now delivering a reliable source of energy from the North Sea. Will the once niche technology become an economic gamechanger?

programme.title: Contaminated And Scarce: The Growing Fight For Clean Water
programme.desc: In the world's wettest state - Meghalaya - local communities tackle water shortages, while India's thirsty megacities use more water than can be replenished. What are the solutions?

programme.title: USA - The War Against Women's Rights
programme.desc: This film shows the dramatic state of women's rights in the USA, today. Radical abortion bans and the unequal treatment of women and men by the justice system are leading to massive restrictions on fundamental rights.

programme.title: What Alcohol Really Does To Your Driving
programme.desc: Driving drunk is one of the biggest risk factors on the road - but what exactly goes wrong when alcohol kicks in? In this REV experiment, reporter Kai Steinecke puts himself through a high-end driving simulator to test how alcohol affects perception, reaction time, risk-taking and control.

programme.title: USA - The War Against Women's Rights
programme.desc: This film shows the dramatic state of women's rights in the USA, today. Radical abortion bans and the unequal treatment of women and men by the justice system are leading to massive restrictions on fundamental rights.

programme.title: Contaminated And Scarce: The Growing Fight For Clean Water
programme.desc: In the world's wettest state - Meghalaya - local communities tackle water shortages, while India's thirsty megacities use more water than can be replenished. What are the solutions?

programme.title: What Alcohol Really Does To Your Driving
programme.desc: Driving drunk is one of the biggest risk factors on the road - but what exactly goes wrong when alcohol kicks in? In this REV experiment, reporter Kai Steinecke puts himself through a high-end driving simulator to test how alcohol affects perception, reaction time, risk-taking and control.

programme.title: E4 - 垂虹送別(下)
programme.desc: 中的名場面，用現代方式表達其中蘊藏的經典文化與精神內涵，彰顯中華文明突出特性。邀請陳銘、喻恩泰、楊迪、王子異組成「萬卷遊學團」，羅一舟、張凌赫、張曉龍、王耀慶、王鶴棣、曾可妮作為「風雅體驗官」，分別體驗五場穿越千年的古今同游，根據遊學攻略不斷加載知識技能，最終完成「傳世名作名場面」的融創秀。

programme.title: E11 - 探訪「世外桃源」 體驗神秘生活
programme.desc: 繼續重磅集結，除了經驗豐富的 “全勤者” 吳奇隆外，新成員林峯、丁禹兮、林允、趙小棠也加入「追星團」；在「星空日記」的魔法下，將打游戲的宅男、疲憊的職場打工人和沉浸於網上沖浪的情侶帶出原有空間一路滑行到戶外，讓受困於都市生活的他們探尋星空與美好的秘密。

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E11 - 探訪「世外桃源」 體驗神秘生活
programme.desc: 繼續重磅集結，除了經驗豐富的 “全勤者” 吳奇隆外，新成員林峯、丁禹兮、林允、趙小棠也加入「追星團」；在「星空日記」的魔法下，將打游戲的宅男、疲憊的職場打工人和沉浸於網上沖浪的情侶帶出原有空間一路滑行到戶外，讓受困於都市生活的他們探尋星空與美好的秘密。

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E8 - 東北冰雪遊戲大亂鬥
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E16

programme.desc: The lively and diverse residents of Gokuldham Housing Society live together as one big family. They navigate everyday challenges, celebrate festivals and find joy in each other's company.

programme.desc: An Indian adaptation of the acclaimed international series 'Shameless'. The plot centers around Anvita, the eldest sister, who looks after her five siblings as her father struggles with alcoholism.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E6 - In Search Of The Unusual/The Blue Arrow
programme.desc: We head off in search of unique photographs in the streets of Geneva, Switzerland, with Andre, retired primary school teacher and music-lover. Before going hunting with Victor in the Swiss Jura, according to the tradition he learnt from his grandfather, a Mexican shaman.

programme.title: E17 - Marcel Marongiu/''se Mettre Sur Son 31''/Sake/Red
programme.desc: From fashion to painting, the designer Marcel Marongiu presents his pictures at the Poliakoff Gallery. Encounter. All about the French expression ''se mettre sur son 31'' (dressing to the nines). Wakaze creates sake made in France. Red alert: but how best to wear it?

programme.title: E18 - When Belgium Sets The Tone
programme.desc: Fifty years of career for Jean-Luc Fonck who, with his band Sttellla, has never stopped daring, amusing and surprising; the opening of the largest tropical greenhouse in the world at Pairi Daiza; the final rehearsals of Alex Vizorek's musical, with Alice on the Roof and Mustii.

Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E17 - Marcel Marongiu/''se Mettre Sur Son 31''/Sake/Red
programme.desc: From fashion to painting, the designer Marcel Marongiu presents his pictures at the Poliakoff Gallery. Encounter. All about the French expression ''se mettre sur son 31'' (dressing to the nines). Wakaze creates sake made in France. Red alert: but how best to wear it?

programme.title: E18 - When Belgium Sets The Tone
programme.desc: Fifty years of career for Jean-Luc Fonck who, with his band Sttellla, has never stopped daring, amusing and surprising; the opening of the largest tropical greenhouse in the world at Pairi Daiza; the final rehearsals of Alex Vizorek's musical, with Alice on the Roof and Mustii.

programme.title: E14 - Should We Eat Three Times A Day?
programme.desc: Who said we should eat three times a day? Why is it the most widespread model in the West? Also: analysis of new products, a corn chips taste test, the secrets of choux pastry.

programme.title: E17 - Marcel Marongiu/''se Mettre Sur Son 31''/Sake/Red
programme.desc: From fashion to painting, the designer Marcel Marongiu presents his pictures at the Poliakoff Gallery. Encounter. All about the French expression ''se mettre sur son 31'' (dressing to the nines). Wakaze creates sake made in France. Red alert: but how best to wear it?

programme.desc: Fifty years of career for Jean-Luc Fonck who, with his band Sttellla, has never stopped daring, amusing and surprising; the opening of the largest tropical greenhouse in the world at Pairi Daiza; the final rehearsals of Alex Vizorek's musical, with Alice on the Roof and Mustii.

E6 - When I Grow Up I Want To Be!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns about all the things he can be when he grows up! His adventure starts with a school trip to the fire station, where the kids learn what to do in an emergency & how firefighters are true superheroes! Then, he learns about all the different community helpers, like police officers & doctors. The learning continues as he discovers all about traffic lights & road safety while playing with his new toy car.

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E6 - When I Grow Up I Want To Be!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns about all the things he can be when he grows up! His adventure starts with a school trip to the fire station, where the kids learn what to do in an emergency & how firefighters are true superheroes! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: One Win
programme.desc: Woo-jin's win rate as a coach is less than 10%! Dismissed, expelled, bankrupt, kicked out, divorced...Even in life, he's experiencing defeat after defeat. Then, Pink Storm, a pro volleyball team that is on the brink of disbanding, brings him on as their coach. Pink Storm's ace players have all transferred to another team, so it's currently a team of leftovers. Jung-won buys the team even though the players have no skills and no teamwork. Jung-won, who is obsessed with creating a heartwarming story of losers' growing pains, pledges to give away a total of $2 million if Pink Storm wins just once. Pink Storm becomes the center of attention, but they keep losing. Woo-jin is used to losing, but he still gets frustrated. Even though the players lack experience and potential, he starts to desire one win...

programme.title: I DID IT MY WAY
programme.desc: In the new century, the fight against drugs faces an unprecedented and difficult challenge! Under the deep and complex dark network, an invisible war is being waged in Hong Kong...... Typhoon signal was hoisted in Hong Kong. Under the cover of the fierce wind, four tons of methamphetamine were entering Hong Kong, pending to be sold on the dark network. A cyber revelry of druggies was about to be unveiled, and a storm was brewing in the quiet Victoria Harbour. Police had to arrest the “boss” behind the scenes and nip the “drug network” in the bud in no time, that pushed their undercover intelligence to the narrow road. In the center of the storm, undercover agents, police officers, drug lords, black, white, and gray entangled.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E274 -Night King
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: As It Burns
programme.desc: An explosion takes place in an apartment late at night, detective Ngai Wan arrives for the investigation and a charred woman body found on spot, her name is Yin Ching. Ching is getting married with Ng Lam who grew up in a wealthy family. Though it seems to be an accident, Wan feels that something is unusual. Wan first investigate the background of Ching and finds that her mother was died in a fire accident fifteen years ago also. Before that, Ching and her mother were in a difficult relationship, Lo Chi Fung was the only person Ching could talk to. They both grew up in Pak Sin Town and disappeared together after the accident happened. Wan perseveres in the investigation but the case just like falling into the mist as everyone related to Ching are all hiding some secrets. The turning point comes out until Lo Chi Fung and his girlfriend Lam Yam show up. The two fatal cases are crossing fifteen years, everyone can be suspected. The truth is far beyond everyone's imagination behi

programme.title: E124 - Glitterspy
programme.desc: There’s a new villain in town but he’s not coming for the Spies, but for Glitterstar, believing she hiding a giant pearl. As the Spies try and protect their friend, they get trapped and it’s up to Toby and Glitterstar to save them and find the jewel.

programme.title: E42 - Doorway To Adventure
programme.desc: Amato and his friends discover a pair of robot doors with the ability to open a two-way portal, then find themselves stranded on a remote island. Now, they need to use their wits to make it back before class ends.

programme.title: E437 - Bro, Where's The Batmobile?/White Elephant/Ruler's Rule/Hero Hotline/Stickiest Situat
programme.desc: After a fun night out, Birdarang and Batarang must retrace their steps to find the Batmobile.

programme.title: E119 - The Zoo/That Will Be All/The New Crystal Gems
programme.desc: Steven visits a special zoo.

programme.title: E1 - Cold Start
programme.desc: Mikey links up with astronaut Chris Hadfield in space, and a landing gear collapse sends the Buffalo crew scrambling.

programme.title: E2 - Shootout
programme.desc: NHL players from the Ottawa Senators shoot pucks with Mikey and the Buffalo Airways team; and there’s panic in the cockpit when DC-3 co-pilot David navigates a bad landing.

programme.title: E5 - Don’t Look Down
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: E2 - Henhouse of Horrors
programme.desc: Billy comes to the rescue at a farm where a predator is creating a horror show at a chicken coop. Then he goes way north to work with partner Terry to solve a beaver problem.

programme.title: E1 - Aircraft Recovery
programme.desc: Swamp Ghost is an hour long documentary covering the attempt to recover the long lost aircraft. Fred Hagen, Aircraft Historian and Recovery Expert is on mission to recover the Swamp Ghost and return it home. Fred and his team trek through crocodile and deadly insect infested swamps to recover the long lost aircraft.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E67
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。
